sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28025" key="docomataio/sofos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δοξο-μᾰταιόσοφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n28025.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">would-be philosopher,</tr_> Epigr. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1392.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hegesand.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
